goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'home from home'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel' and 'hotel type'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 20:45' and should go to 'stevenage'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called home from home
Make sure you get star of the hotel and hotel type
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 20:45 and should go to stevenage
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on thursday
Make sure you get departure time and price
